title: Richly Filipino Coconut Soup
description: A rich and creamy Filipino coconut soup infused with rose water for an energizing and aromatic treat, perfect as a raw-friendly breakfast option.

ingredients.name: 3 tablespoons grated fresh ginger
ingredients.notes: optional, add for extra flavor and detox properties

ingredients.name: 2 tablespoons raw honey or agave nectar
3-4 pandan leaves (optional)
ingredients.notes: to infuse flavor and color, if using fresh leave them whole

ingredients.name: 1/4 cup coconut cream for garnish (raw-friendly option)
Fresh rose water or rose petal syrup

instructions: Bring a pot of water to boil, add pandan leaves and cook for about 5 minutes. Strain the mixture into another container.
In a blender, combine coconut milk, ginger (if using), full-fat coconut cream, cooked pandan water, honey or agave nectar, and rose water. Blend until smooth.
Pour the blended soup back into the pot with added pandan leaves. Warm it up over medium heat for about 5 minutes to blend flavors well.
Serve in bowls garnished with fresh mint leaves and a dollop of coconut cream on top for an extra touch.
